Observation on functionality of all OPD's. : All OPDs are functional and patients were found in good number attending all OPDs. Most of the patients were observed and enquired as genuine. But proper entry of records in respective registers is lacking and some mismatches were also observed like (1) Patient Ayushmita Das 8yrs with OPD Number 12560 attended OPD and then admitted in IPD but no entry was found in Screening Register, Pics of both registers available. (2) In KC OPD old patient Sumna Raut was observed with multiple visits in the OPD but OPD number is missing, last OPD attended before 11th May was 11th April as per OPD slip but no entry on OPD register on the date was found. Moreover OPD Fee deposition receipt of 11th April was also observed attached with the OPD Papers. Pics of all pages of OPD sheet and receipt available. (3) Shalya and PTSR procedure Room attached with OPD is with inadequate instrument/equipment/facilities. (4) Emmergencu OPD stock register was not proper. No entry for available Providine Iodine was obsrved in the register. Pic of Providine Iodine and Register available.
Observation on functionality of all Hospital. :

Hospital id functional and patients were observed in all IPDs. Most of the patients were observed and enquired as genuine. But proper entry of records in respective registers is lacking and some mismatches were also observed like (1) Patient Mitali Das 24yF admitted in PTSR IPD with IPD Number 009425 and deliverd baby on 09.02.2025 at 05:10AM but as per Deliver Register the time of deliver was 09:45PM. Scan of case sheet and Register available. (2) Similarly Patient Pinki Raut 26yF admitted in PTSR with IPD number 009665 delived a baby at 08:25 PM as per case sheet but in Deliver register the time of birth shown was 09:30 PM. Scan of case sheet and Register available. (3) One patient Suparna mandal 33yF with IPD No. 009749 advised and done investigations for TC/DC/ESR/Hb/HIV/ BSL/BT/CT on 07.05.2026 but the same was not found in Pathology Register, rather single entry for investigation in Pathology register was for patient Abdul Samad having IPD number 009743. Scan of case sheet and Register available. (4) BMW register was not available with the hospital and in Central Pathology 2 dustbeans were observed full of Bio-medical wastes. (5) Cell Counter was not available.
(6) Central Pathology maintains only single register for hematology, serology, biochemistry etc investigations.

Observation on Conditions of Deparments. : All departments were good and maintained. Rog Nidan department was very well maintained and beautified. The documentation part of departments are not very proper especially (1) Times tables were not displayed in the departments and corridors but students were aware of the same through official WhatsApp. (2) In some departments library registers were not properly maintained. (3) Printers were not observed in any department. (4) Central library records were not properly maintained. 233 old issues of some journals, Catalogues of Chaukhambha and other publications, Souveniers of seminars were also included in Acsession Register.

Overall opinion about Hospital/Colleges. : Overall OPD and IPD of Hospital observed functional. Mostly genuine patients were observed. Medicines in good quantity was observed in Medicine Dispense, good quantity of raw drugs were observed and medicine prepartion process was also operational. The documentation part was observed as not proper and mismatched observed.

(1) Patient Ayushmita Das 8yrs with OPD Number 12560 attended OPD and then admitted in IPD but no entry was found in Screening Register, Pics of both registers available. (2) In KC OPD old patient Sumna Raut was observed with multiple visits in the OPD but OPD number is missing, last OPD attended before 11th May was 11th April as per OPD slip but no entry on OPD register on the date was found. Moreover OPD Fee deposition receipt of 11th April was also observed attached with the OPD Papers. Pics of all pages of OPD sheet and receipt available. (3) Shalya and PTSR procedure Room attached with OPD is with inadequate instrument/equipment/facilities. (4) Emmergencu OPD stock register was not proper. No entry for available Providine Iodine was obsrved in the register. Pic of Providine Iodine and Register available. (5) Patient Mitali Das 24yF admitted in PTSR IPD with IPD Number 009425 and deliverd baby on 09.02.2025 at 05:10AM but as per Deliver Register the time of deliver was 09:45PM. Scan of case sheet and Register available. (6) Similarly Patient Pinki Raut 26yF admitted in PTSR with IPD number 009665 delived a baby at 08:25 PM as per case sheet but in Deliver register the time of birth shown was 09:30 PM. Scan of case sheet and Register available. (7) One patient Suparna mandal 33yF with IPD No. 009749 advised and done investigations for TC/DC/ESR/Hb/HIV/ BSL/BT/CT on 07.05.2026 but the same was not found in Pathology Register, rather single entry for investigation in Pathology register was for patient Abdul Samad having IPD number 009743. Scan of case sheet and Register available. (8) BMW register was not available with the hospital and in Central Pathology 2 dustbeans were observed full of Bio-medical wastes. (9) Cell Counter was not available. (10) Central Pathology maintains only single register for hematology, serology, biochemistry etc investigations.

department. (14) Central library records were not properly maintained. 233 old issues of some journals, Catalogues of Chaukhambha and other publications, Souveniers of seminars were also included in Acsession Register.

Observation regarding deficience observed by visitors. : In the hospital and college many registers were observed as not properly maintained and mismatches were also observed in the records. (1) Patient Ayushmita Das 8yrs with OPD Number 12560 attended OPD and then admitted in IPD but no entry was found in Screening Register. (2) In KC OPD old patient Sumna Raut was observed with multiple visits in the OPD but OPD number is missing, last OPD attended before 11th May was 11th April as per OPD slip but no entry on OPD register on the date was found. Moreover OPD Fee deposition receipt of 11th April was also observed attached with the OPD Papers. (3) Shalya and PTSR procedure Room attached with OPD is with inadequate instrument/equipment/facilities. (4) Emmergencu OPD stock register was not proper. No entry for available Providine Iodine was obsrved in the register. (5) Patient Mitali Das 24yF admitted in PTSR IPD with IPD Number 009425 and deliverd baby on 09.02.2025 at 05:10AM but as per Deliver Register the time of deliver was 09:45PM. (6) Similarly Patient Pinki Raut 26yF admitted in PTSR with IPD number 009665 delived a baby at 08:25 PM as per case sheet but in Deliver register the time of birth shown was 09:30 PM.

(7) One patient Suparna mandal 33yF with IPD No. 009749 advised and done investigations for TC/DC/ESR/Hb/HIV/ BSL/BT/CT on 07.05.2026 but the same was not found in Pathology Register, rather single entry for investigation in Pathology register was for patient Abdul Samad having IPD number 009743. (8) BMW register was not available with the hospital and in Central Pathology 2 dustbeans were observed full of Bio-medical wastes. (9) Cell Counter was not available.

(10) Central Pathology maintains only single register for hematology, serology, biochemistry etc investigations. (11) Times tables were not displayed in the departments and corridors but students were aware of the same through official WhatsApp.

(12) In some departments library registers were not properly maintained. (13) Printers were not observed in any department. (14) Central library records were not properly maintained. 233 old issues of some journals, Catalogues of Chaukhambha and other publications, Souveniers of seminars were also included in Acsession Register. (15) BMW, Pollution and Fire Certificates are age old and has not been renewed. (16) Hospital Registration Certificate was not produced despite repeated requests.

AEBAS Remarks : AEBAS for Teaching Faculty is functional. CCTV was observed placed covering AEBAS. Footages were observed for last random dates within 3 months from the date of visitation. But AEBAS for Non-teaching and Hospital Staff has not been yet implemented.
